ksa_text: Develop and maintain comprehensive organizational privacy programs and policies that integrate privacy considerations across business operations, projects, and systems.

dcwf.top_element_label: Create auditable evidence of security measures.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-001 (SP, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4623 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.462, eu_ai_act=0.458, nice=0.436) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4623 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-T-001 (composite 0.4623) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4623 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4623 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4623, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
